name: updates-latest
_note:
Public; never 404. Response shape is deterministic given the seeded app_releases / app_release_policies rows; only the nested platforms.

.updated_at reflects the live DB write time, so it's ignored. PREREQUISITE: the shadow DB must hold identical release rows for Node and Go — automatic since both hit the same Postgres. If the DB has no release rows, both return the empty-manifest 200 (platforms:{}) which is also identical. Top-level *_url/*_sha256 are always present ("" when absent); platforms omits null rows.
